compiled_state.title: Extract _flock_stage_commit() helper from write_commit_event()
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Refactor plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh to extract the flock-acquire/atomic-staging/git-add/git-commit logic from write_commit_event() into a new function.

Full parameter contract: _flock_stage_commit(tracker_dir, staging_temp, final_path, commit_msg)
- tracker_dir: canonical path to .tickets-tracker/ (derives lock_file as tracker_dir/.ticket-write.lock)
- staging_temp: absolute path to the staged temp file (same filesystem as tracker_dir)
- final_path: absolute destination path (atomic rename target). The function must derive a tracker_dir-relative path from final_path for git add.
- commit_msg: git commit message string
- Lock file, flock_timeout (30s), max_retries (2) are derived internally from tracker_dir
- gc.auto=0 guard is applied internally
- The Python flock block (lines 132-188) moves into this function; write_commit_event constructs params from its own (ticket_id, event_type, etc.) and delegates

Mark as stable internal API: "# Stable internal API — used by write_commit_event and emit-review-event.sh"

## TDD Requirement

GREEN — Task 2's RED tests pass after extraction. All existing test-ticket-lib.sh tests continue to pass (behavior-preserving refactor).

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] _flock_stage_commit function exists
  Verify: grep -q "_flock_stage_commit()" plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh
- [ ] write_commit_event delegates to _flock_stage_commit
  Verify: bash -c 'source plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh && type _flock_stage_commit | grep -q "function"'
- [ ] Existing ticket tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh
